title: Should You Buy This Dividend Growth Stock?
text: Last month, TJX Companies boosted its quarterly dividend by a staggering 13.5%.

title: The TJX Companies, Inc. Announces New Global Environmental Goals, Including a Plan to Achieve Net Zero Emissions in its Own Operations by 2040
text: FRAMINGHAM, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The TJX Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TJX), the leading off-price apparel and home fashions retailer in the U.S. and worldwide, today announced plans to expand and accelerate environmental goals as part of the Company's ongoing environmental sustainability strategy. As part of its global efforts, TJX is aiming to: Achieve net zero greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions in its operations by 2040 Source 100% renewable energy in its operations by 2030 Divert 85% of its operati

title: Online Sales Aid The TJX Companies (TJX), High Costs Ail
text: The TJX Companies' (TJX) focus on enhancing store and e-commerce sales bodes well. However, escalated freight and wage costs are headwinds.

title: Key logistics index hits all-time high, but market peak may be past
text: The Logistics Managers' Index Report for March comes right at the inflection point between one of the strongest freight markets ever and the dow n town that inevitably follows such a peak. Its summary and data points are all at highs or near-highs throughout the various categories.

title: The Ratings Game: Ralph Lauren, Vans parent VF Corp. and off-price retailer TJX downgraded as 2022 fashion outlook grows more gloomy
text: Wells Fargo has taken another look at what may be coming in 2022, and sees challenges ahead for the fashion and retail sectors.

title: TJX Companies: This Bargain Retailer Is Itself A Bargain
text: The TJX Companies, Inc. is the leading off-price retailer of apparel and home fashions.

title: 3 Retailers Providing at Least 10% Dividend Raises
text: Companies in the retail industry were some of the most impacted during the Covid-19 pandemic. Many physical store locations were closed as social distancing restrictions were put in place to slow the spread of the virus.
